productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Besulik Trainer White Black Red Shoe
description: CompositionWhite, black and red training shoes with synthetic mesh upper, EVA sockliner and multi-surface outsole made of non-marking leather and performance training pivot pointWash care1. Remove dust with soft, clean, damp cloth2. Do not machine washTraining for Sports or at the gym can become all the more fun in these comfortable shoes from adidas. The outsole is made of non-marking leather with a performnace training pivot point on the big toe mound. The outsole is ridged to ensure ultimate grip and support for the feet, while the synthetic mesh upper ensures ample ventilation, keeping the feet cool and dry. The EVA sockliner provides a comfort Fit making it an ideal urban footwear.
